translations.en: Upon seeing someone in trial or tribulation

text.arabic:
الْحَمْـدُ للهِ الّذي عافاني مِمّا ابْتَـلاكَ بِهِ،
وَفَضَّلَـني عَلى كَثيـرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَـقَ تَفْضـيلا
text.transliteration:
Alhamdu lillāhi ‘l-ladhī `āfānī mimmab-talāka bihi
wa faḍḍalanī `alā kathīrin mimman khalaqa tafḍīlā.

translations.en:
Praise is to Allah Who has spared me what He has afflicted you with,
and preferred me greatly above much of what He has created.

items.reference: At-Tirmidhi 5/493,4. See also Al-Albani, Sahih At-Tirmidhi 3/153.
